english: I have a ruler / an eraser.
Mr Jones, this is Miss Green.
chinese: 琼斯先生，这是格林小姐。

english: Can I have some water, please?
It has small eyes and big ears.
No. it isn't. / Yes, it is.

chinese: 宝贝儿，我们买点水果吧。

english: No, I don't. / Yes, I do.
chinese: 不，我不喜欢。1是的，我喜欢。P.48

english: How many kites do you see?
chinese: 你看见了多少个风筝呀?

english: The black one is a bird!
How many crayons do you have?
An English book, a maths book， three storybooks and..
chinese: 一本英语书，一本数学书，三本故事书

english: He has glasses and his shoes are blue.
Is she in the living room?
No. they aren't. They're in the door.
Td like some soup and bread， please. （I'd like = I would like）
Would you like a knife and fork?
How many people are there in your family, Chen Jie?
Yes, it is. He's a football player.
chinese: 是的，他是位足球运动员。

english: No. it isn't. The teachers' office is next to the library.
chinese: 不，不是。教师办公室挨着图书馆。

english: It's 6 o'clock. It's time for dinner.
Yes, you can. / No. you can't.
What's the weather like in New York?
Can I try them on? Size 6. please.
chinese: 我能试试吗?请给我拿6号的。

english: How do you like this skirt?
chinese: 这条短裙你觉得怎么样?

english: What do you have on Thursdays?
I have maths, English and music.
chinese: 我有数学、英语和音乐课。

english: Do you often read books in this park?
chinese: 你经常在这个公园里看书吗?
不，我不经常在这里看书。

english: What would you like to eat?
What would you like to drink?
What can you do for the party. children?
chinese: 孩子们，你们能联欢会做什么?p.38

english: Can you do any kung fu, John?
There are so many pictures here.
Is there a river in the forest， Miss White?
chinese: 怀特小姐，森林里有河吗?

english: You can't judge a book by its cover.
For the hard-working, a week has seven days; for the lazy, seven tomorrows.
chinese: 勤奋的人，一个星期有七天；懒惰的人，一个星期有七个明天。

english: An apple a day keeps the doctor away.
chinese: 每天一个苹果，医生远离我。

english: Are there any tall buildings in the nature park?

chinese: 不，自然公园里没有高楼。

english: East or west, home is best.
When do you finish class in the morning?
chinese: 你们上午的课到几点结束?
我们一点钟结束上午的课。

english: What do you do on the weekend?
I often watch TV and play ping-pong with my father.
chinese: 我经常看电视，也常和我爸爸一起打乒乓球。

english: Which season do you like best， Mike?
chinese: 迈克，你最喜欢哪个季节?

english: When is the trip this year?
chinese: 今年的（秋）游在什么时候?

english: It's in October. We'l go to the Great Wall.

chinese: 那幅黄颜色的画是我的。

english: The early bird catches the worm.

chinese: 春有百花秋有月，夏有凉风冬有雪。

english: Yesterday, today and tomorrow—these are the three days of man.
chinese: 人生有三天：昨天、今天和明天。

english: It's the empty can that makes the most noise.
How do you come to school?
In the USA people on bikes must wear one.
chinese: 在美国骑自行车的人必须戴（头盔）。

english: Don't go at the red light!
I must pay attention to the traffic lights!
chinese: 我必须注意交通信号灯!

english: What are you going to do tomorrow?
I'm going to have an art lesson.
Were going to draw some pictures in Renmin Park.
chinese: 我们要到人民公园去画画。

english: Does he like doing word puzzles and going hiking?
chinese: 他喜欢猜字谜和远足吗?

english: How does he go to work?
He goes to work by bike.
Better to ask the way than go astray.
The cat is angry with them.
He should see a doctor this morning.
chinese: 他今天早上应该去看病。

english: A friend in need is a friend indeed.
That's the tallest dinosaur in this hall.
chinese: 那是这个厅里最高的恐龙。

english: It's taller than both of us together.
What size are your shoes， Mike?
Your feet are bigger than mine. My shoes are size 37.
chinese: 你的脚比我的大。我穿37号的鞋。P.6

english: I stayed at home with your grandma. We drank tea in the afternoon and watched TV.
chinese: 我和你奶奶待在家里。我们喝了下午茶，还看了电视。
你还做了其他什么事吗?

english: Yes, I cleaned my room and washed my clothes.
chinese: 是的，我打扫了房间，还洗了衣服。p.14

english: I want to buy the new film magazine.
chinese: 我想买期新的电影杂志。

english: What did you do last weekend? Did you see a film?
chinese: 你上周末干什么了?你看电影了吗?

english: No. I had a cold. I stayed at home all weekend and slept.
chinese: 没有，我感冒了。整个周末都待在家里睡觉。

english: All work and no play makes Jack a dull boy.
chinese: 只工作不玩耍，聪明杰克也变傻。

english: There was no library in my old school.
chinese: 我以前的学校里没有图书馆。

english: Tell us about your school, please.
chinese: 请给我们讲讲您的学校吧。

english: There were no computers or Internet in my time.
chinese: 我那时候没有电脑也没有网络。

english: Before, I was quiet. Now, I'm very active in class.
chinese: 以前我很安静。现在我在课堂上很活跃。

english: I was short, so I couldn't ride my bike well. Now, I go cycling every day.
chinese: 我以前个子小，自行车骑得不好。现在我天天骑车。

english: Life is what you make it.
chinese: 生活是自己创造出来的。
